module {
  func.func @main() {
    %c1 = arith.constant 1 : index
    %c0 = arith.constant 0 : index
    cf.br ^bb1(%c0 : index)
  ^bb1(%0: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb0, ^bb4
    %1 = arith.cmpi slt, %0, %c1 : index
    cf.cond_br %1, ^bb2(%c0 : index), ^bb5
  ^bb2(%2: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb1, ^bb3
    %3 = arith.cmpi slt, %2, %c1 : index
    cf.cond_br %3, ^bb3, ^bb4
  ^bb3:  // pred: ^bb2
    %4 = arith.addi %2, %c1 : index
    cf.br ^bb2(%4 : index)
  ^bb4:  // pred: ^bb2
    %5 = arith.addi %0, %c1 : index
    cf.br ^bb1(%5 : index)
  ^bb5:  // pred: ^bb1
    return
  }
}

module {
  func.func @parallel(%arg0: index, %arg1: index, %arg2: index, %arg3: index, %arg4: index, %arg5: index) {
    cf.br ^bb1(%arg0 : index)
  ^bb1(%0: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb0, ^bb4
    %1 = arith.cmpi slt, %0, %arg2 : index
    cf.cond_br %1, ^bb2(%arg1 : index), ^bb5
  ^bb2(%2: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb1, ^bb3
    %3 = arith.cmpi slt, %2, %arg3 : index
    cf.cond_br %3, ^bb3, ^bb4
  ^bb3:  // pred: ^bb2
    "test.payload"(%0, %2) : (index, index) -> ()
    %4 = arith.addi %2, %arg5 : index
    cf.br ^bb2(%4 : index)
  ^bb4:  // pred: ^bb2
    %5 = arith.addi %0, %arg4 : index
    cf.br ^bb1(%5 : index)
  ^bb5:  // pred: ^bb1
    return
  }
  func.func @nested_loops(%arg0: index, %arg1: index, %arg2: index, %arg3: index, %arg4: index, %arg5: index) {
    cf.br ^bb1(%arg0 : index)
  ^bb1(%0: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb0, ^bb4
    %1 = arith.cmpi slt, %0, %arg2 : index
    cf.cond_br %1, ^bb2(%arg1 : index), ^bb5
  ^bb2(%2: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb1, ^bb3
    %3 = arith.cmpi slt, %2, %arg3 : index
    cf.cond_br %3, ^bb3, ^bb4
  ^bb3:  // pred: ^bb2
    "test.payload"(%0, %2) : (index, index) -> ()
    %4 = arith.addi %2, %arg5 : index
    cf.br ^bb2(%4 : index)
  ^bb4:  // pred: ^bb2
    %5 = arith.addi %0, %arg4 : index
    cf.br ^bb1(%5 : index)
  ^bb5:  // pred: ^bb1
    return
  }
  func.func @adjacent_loops(%arg0: index, %arg1: index, %arg2: index, %arg3: index, %arg4: index, %arg5: index) {
    cf.br ^bb1(%arg0 : index)
  ^bb1(%0: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb0, ^bb2
    %1 = arith.cmpi slt, %0, %arg2 : index
    cf.cond_br %1, ^bb2, ^bb3(%arg1 : index)
  ^bb2:  // pred: ^bb1
    "test.payload1"(%0) : (index) -> ()
    %2 = arith.addi %0, %arg4 : index
    cf.br ^bb1(%2 : index)
  ^bb3(%3: index):  // 2 preds: ^bb1, ^bb4
    %4 = arith.cmpi slt, %3, %arg3 : index
    cf.cond_br %4, ^bb4, ^bb5
  ^bb4:  // pred: ^bb3
    "test.payload2"(%3) : (index) -> ()
    %5 = arith.addi %3, %arg5 : index
    cf.br ^bb3(%5 : index)
  ^bb5:  // pred: ^bb3
    return
  }
}
